label: no
cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out who ends up with which book after all these trades. There are five friends: Alice, Bob, Claire, Dave, and Eve. Each starts with their own book, and then there are a series of swaps. I need to keep track of each step carefully to avoid getting confused. First, let me list out the initial books each person has: - Alice: Moby Dick - Bob: Ulysses - Claire: The Fellowship of the Ring - Dave: Lolita - Eve: Catch-22 Now, the trades happen in a sequence. Let me go through each swap one by one and update the books that each person has after each step. First swap: Claire and Bob swap books. So before this swap: - Claire has The Fellowship of the Ring - Bob has Ulysses After swapping: - Claire now has Ulysses - Bob now has The Fellowship of the Ring So after first swap: - Alice: Moby Dick - Bob: The Fellowship of the Ring - Claire: Ulysses - Dave: Lolita - Eve: Catch-22 Second swap: Claire and Dave swap books. Before this swap: - Claire has Ulysses - Dave has Lolita After swapping: - Claire now has Lolita - Dave now has Ulysses So after second swap: - Alice: Moby Dick - Bob: The
